title: Recife, PE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Recife is a city in PE with a population of 1,661,017. The ‘Venice of Brazil’ with its canals and bridges, a hub of culture, technology, and stunning beaches like Boa Viagem.
